home.metaTitle: MC Retreats | Elite Fitness Retreat — The Corn Crib, Wiltshire · Sept 2025
home.metaDescription: A 4-day elite performance retreat for 10 men at The Corn Crib, Wiltshire. 7–11 September 2025. Training, recovery, nutrition, mindset. From £1,495.
home.ogTitle: MC Retreats | Elite 4-Day Fitness Retreat, Wiltshire 2025
home.ogDescription: 4 days. 10 men. One transformational experience at The Corn Crib, Wiltshire — 7–11 September 2025.
home.heroSubheadline: A 4-day elite performance retreat for men who are serious about transforming their body, mind, and standards.
home.heroNote: Secure your place with a £500 deposit · Only 10 rooms
home.whoCard1Desc: Training has become inconsistent. Results have stalled. The drive that used to be automatic has faded.
home.whoCard2Desc: You know what to do. The environment around you just doesn't demand it.
home.whoCard3Desc: In time, in money, in discomfort. You understand that the best returns come from serious commitment.
home.whoCard4Desc: Not just for 4 days. You want a physical and mental reset that sticks when you return home.
home.whoCard5Desc: Small group. Shared standards. The kind of people who push you without needing to compete.
home.whoCard6Desc: Training alone isn't enough. You want the nutrition, recovery, mindset piece, all working together.
home.experienceIntro: Four days of structured training, expert nutrition, guided recovery, and performance mindset work. Every element designed with one goal: results that stay.
home.venuePreviewText: A private estate taken exclusively for 10 men. No distractions. No other guests. Just the environment you need to perform.
home.venuePreviewText2: Heated outdoor pool, Finnish sauna, professional kitchen, games room, and stunning Wiltshire countryside on all sides.
home.coach1Quote: I don't work with excuses. I work with results.
home.coach2Quote: Most men know what to do. They just need the right environment to do it.
home.testimonial1Quote: Four days that changed how I approach training, food, and myself. The level of coaching is something I've never experienced before.
home.testimonial2Quote: I'd been in a rut for two years. This reset everything. The venue, the coaches, the group — exactly what I needed.
home.testimonial3Quote: Not a spa break. Not a bootcamp. Something in between and better than both. Came home a different person.
home.ctaNote: Secure your place with a £500 deposit

about.metaTitle: About MC Retreats | Steven Machin & Gaz Crosby — Elite Performance Coaches
about.metaDescription: Meet the coaches behind MC Retreats. Steven Machin and Gaz Crosby bring decades of elite performance coaching to a 4-day transformational retreat in Wiltshire.
about.ogTitle: About MC Retreats — Meet Your Coaches
about.ogDescription: Two elite coaches. One shared mission. Meet Steven Machin and Gaz Crosby.
about.heroSubtitle: Two coaches. One shared mission. Decades of combined experience distilled into four days that change men.
about.missionQuote: We've worked with hundreds of high-performing men. The pattern is always the same: they know what to do. They just need the right environment to finally do it.
about.stevenBio: Steven Machin has spent over a decade helping high-performing men rebuild their physical foundations and unlock elite standards of performance. A specialist in strength, conditioning, and performance mindset, Steven doesn't work with excuses — he works with results. His methodology is direct, evidence-based, and built around sustainable transformation that goes far beyond the retreat itself.
about.gazBio: Gaz Crosby brings an uncompromising approach to fitness and lifestyle transformation. With years of experience coaching men through physical and mental plateaus, Gaz understands what it takes to rebuild from the ground up. His training philosophy combines functional strength, metabolic performance, and the kind of honest accountability that most men never experience.
about.philosophy1Desc: We tell you exactly what you need to hear. Not what you want to hear. The men we work with respect that.
about.philosophy2Desc: Every session, every meal, every protocol is grounded in what actually works. No trends. No guesswork.
about.philosophy3Desc: Four days is the catalyst. The tools, habits, and mindset you leave with are for life.

experience.metaTitle: The Retreat Experience | MC Retreats — Training, Recovery, Nutrition, Mindset
experience.metaDescription: Structured training, expert nutrition, guided recovery, and performance mindset. Discover exactly what 4 days at MC Retreats looks like.
experience.ogDescription: Training. Recovery. Nutrition. Mindset. Four pillars. Four days. One transformation.
experience.trainingDesc: Every session is intentional. From early morning conditioning to strength work and metabolic finishers — you'll be pushed, but with precision. No wasted effort, no filler. Just structured progressive work that leaves a mark.
experience.recoveryDesc: Cold plunge, sauna sessions, guided breathwork, and structured restoration protocols. Recovery isn't passive here — it's a performance tool. You'll leave knowing how to use it.
experience.nutritionDesc: Every meal is planned and prepared to support performance. High protein, whole foods, perfectly timed to training. You'll learn why fuelling properly is the missing piece — and take that knowledge home.
experience.mindsetDesc: Group sessions focused on the psychology of high performance. Understand what's been holding you back, where your patterns come from, and how to replace them. You'll leave with a framework you'll use for years.

venue.metaTitle: The Corn Crib, Wiltshire | MC Retreats — Exclusive Private Venue
venue.metaDescription: The Corn Crib is a stunning private estate in the heart of Wiltshire with 10 rooms, heated outdoor pool, Finnish sauna, and professional kitchen.
venue.ogTitle: Our Venue — The Corn Crib, Wiltshire
venue.ogDescription: Exclusive private estate. 10 rooms. Heated pool, Finnish sauna, stunning gardens. The ultimate performance environment.
venue.venueIntro: The Corn Crib is an exclusive private estate nestled deep in the Wiltshire countryside. Taken over entirely for 10 men — no other guests, no distractions — this is a space designed for focus, performance, and transformation.
venue.venueDescription: Set within beautifully maintained private grounds, The Corn Crib delivers everything a high-performance retreat demands. A heated outdoor pool. A Finnish sauna. A professional kitchen. Multiple spaces for training, recovery, and reflection. It's not just a beautiful venue — it's the right environment.
venue.poolDesc: The social heart of the estate. Used for active recovery, contrast therapy, and relaxation between sessions.
venue.saunaDesc: Full-size sauna, used in structured contrast therapy protocols alongside cold plunge for maximal recovery.
venue.kitchenDesc: Chef-grade kitchen where all performance meals are prepared. Nutrition education happens here too.
venue.outdoorDiningDesc: Meals taken al fresco when weather allows. The group dynamic starts over good food in a great setting.
venue.firepitDesc: Each evening ends here. Debrief, connect, reflect. Some of the most valuable conversations happen around a fire.
venue.gamesRoomDesc: Downtime is part of recovery. A full games room for evenings when the body needs rest and the mind needs play.

pricing.metaTitle: Pricing & Payment | MC Retreats September 2025 — From £1,495
pricing.metaDescription: MC Retreats from £1,495 per person or £2,200 per room. Flexible options: pay in full, £500 deposit, or payment plan until September. Only 10 rooms available.
pricing.ogDescription: From £1,495 per person. Deposit from £500. Payment plan available. Only 10 rooms.
pricing.pricingIntro: This is a serious investment in yourself. The environment, expertise, and experience are built to deliver results that compound for years. The question isn't whether you can afford it — it's whether you can afford not to.
pricing.perRoomDesc: Private room for two. Ideal for training partners.
pricing.payFullDesc: Simplest option. One payment, fully secured. No further action needed until September.
pricing.payDepositDesc: Secure your place with a deposit. Balance due 30 days before the retreat.
pricing.payPlanDesc: Spread your payments monthly until August 2025. Start with the deposit and we'll agree a schedule.

apply.metaTitle: Apply For Your Place | MC Retreats September 2025
apply.metaDescription: Apply for your place on the MC Retreats 7–11 September 2025 fitness retreat. Only 10 spots available. Secure yours with a £500 deposit.
apply.ogDescription: Only 10 spots. Apply now to secure your place on the retreat.
apply.formIntro: Complete the form below to apply for your place. Once submitted, you'll select your payment option and proceed to secure checkout. Spots are limited to 10.

settings.pricingNote: All payments processed securely via Stripe. Payment plans run until August 2025.
settings.successMessage: Your place is reserved. We'll be in touch within 24 hours with everything you need to prepare.
